mainEntity.name: How do NY vs LA AI visibility strategies differ?
mainEntity.text: How do NY vs LA AI visibility strategies differ?

acceptedAnswer.text: NY emphasizes dense schema for competitive market; LA focuses review volume for sprawling geo-queries. Both need local law citations.

suggestedAnswer.text: NY's saturation demands PR+schema; LA leverages neighborhood FAQs (e.g., Hollywood). NY faster via authority; LA via volume. Adapt per city density. Track city-specific queries. Agencies customize $1k premium.

name: NY vs LA AI Strategies Compared
description: NY emphasizes dense schema for competitive market; LA focuses review volume for sprawling geo-queries. Both need local law citations.
